hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Talk about your plans and goals for the month with be going to -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 17 -- My Plans This Month -- Future Plans with Be Going To
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 17 -- My Plans This Month

listenings.text: Hi, I am Rachel. Let me tell you about my plans for this month. I have a clear aim: I am going to finish the new dashboard. My target is one hundred new users, and that is an important milestone for the team. Next week, we are going to launch a small update. I am also going to review the budget with my manager soon. In the upcoming weeks, I intend to learn more about our data tools. I am not going to take a long vacation this month, but I am going to rest for one weekend. It is a busy month, but I am ready.

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me give an overview of my plans for this month. My main aim is to improve our data process. I am going to set a clear target for my team, and our first milestone is the new report. Soon, we are going to launch a better data pipeline. I am going to add one new analyst to my team in the upcoming weeks, so I intend to plan the budget carefully. I am not going to start a big project this month, because I want to finish the current one first. Every month is different, but I am going to do my best.
